title: Atomic Chat llama.cpp Backends Manifest
description: Schema for the remote llama.cpp backends manifest consumed by the Atomic Chat client (llamacpp-upstream extension). Mirrors the shape of a GitHub release JSON ({ tag_name, assets: [{ name }] }) so the client's existing asset-name parser is reused verbatim.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; refresh on every meaningful change.

tag_name.description: ggml-org/llama.cpp release tag the assets belong to (e.g. b9691).

assets.description: Release assets, mirroring GitHub's release JSON. Only Windows/Linux backend archives (and Windows cudart companions) are listed; macOS is bundled-only and never parsed from this manifest.
